# ContextBoundary

> A vendor-neutral privacy and boundary framework for AI systems. Defines a five-zone vendor tier architecture, Privacy Tier I/II/III classification, jurisdictional Audit Profiles, and an Endpoint Atlas pattern. Connects to ContextOps as the specification layer.

## Core Framework

- [README](README.md): Project overview, structure, and roadmap
- [FRAMEWORK](FRAMEWORK.md): Core framework specification
- [ARCHITECTURE](ARCHITECTURE.md): Three-layer ownership model and where ContextBoundary sits

## Boundary & Classification

- [Boundary Diagram](boundary-diagram.md): Five-zone boundary diagram and zone definitions
- [Tier Classification](tier-classification.md): Privacy Tier I / II / III definitions
- [Vendor Tier Matrix](vendor-tier-matrix.md): Vendor placement across zones
- [Vendors](vendors.md): Full vendor catalog

## Compliance

- [GDPR Audit Profile](gdpr.md): GDPR jurisdictional profile — lawful basis, data subject rights, retention, controller/processor obligations

## Integration

- [ContextOps Mapping](contextops-mapping.md): Connector specification between ContextBoundary and ContextOps

## Contributing

- [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution guidelines
- License: Apache 2.0

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Full content dump for LLM ingestion
